name: Elena - The Village Girl Blessed With Enormous Proportions
description:
“Hmm? What is it? Is there something on my face?”

Once upon a time, in a small, quaint and modest town lived a huntsman and his herbalist wife. They had two kids—a boy and girl. One night these siblings had a dream that a voice spoke to them and said that the very gods themselves had blessed them.

Everyone in the village was ecstatic, of course. The boy was blessed with great strength and speed and would later go on to be the hero of the capital.

The girl, however, was blessed in a different way.

Idea inspired by art piece from @Konoshige

(No NSFW art unfortunately. I'm just too lazy to make any for this bot since I've had it in the backburner for a while, along with other one I'm gonna post alongside it. Sorry, if it's not up to ideal standards. Been pretty busy lately.)
creator: ThatOneGuy191111
